easy.title: Fix Spacing Between Sections
easy.description: The page has three sections but they are touching each other. Fix the spacing by adding proper margins: 20px between sections and center the main content with auto margins.
easy.starterCode:
<header>Header</header>
<main>Main Content</main>
<footer>Footer</footer>

<style>
header, main, footer { padding: 20px; background: #f0f0f0; font-family: Arial; }
</style>
easy.solution:
<header>Header</header>
<main>Main Content</main>
<footer>Footer</footer>

<style>
header, main, footer {
  padding: 20px;
  background: #f0f0f0;
  font-family: Arial;
  max-width: 800px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
main { margin: 20px 0; }
footer { margin-top: 30px; }
</style>

medium.title: Build a Card Layout with Margins
medium.description: Create a 3-card layout with proper margin spacing between cards and the container. Cards should have 20px bottom margin and the container should be centered with auto margins.
medium.starterCode:
Card 1
Card 2
Card 3
medium.solution:
Card 1
Card 2
Card 3
